Opportunity.description: Represents a sale or pending deal.

exampleQueries.intent: Show me recent closed won opportunities
exampleQueries.soql: SELECT Id, Name, Amount, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsWon = true ORDER BY CloseDate DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT Id, Name, StageName, Amount, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false ORDER BY Amount DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

Account.description: Represents an individual account, which is an organization or person involved with your business.

exampleQueries.soql: SELECT Id, Name, Industry, AnnualRevenue FROM Account WHERE AnnualRevenue != null ORDER BY AnnualRevenue DESC LIMIT 5

Contact.description: Represents a contact, which is a person associated with an account.

exampleQueries.soql: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Account.Name FROM Contact WHERE Email = 'example@example.com'
